Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application As To Allen Curtis Eisenberger,
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Community Bank of the Bay's Application For Right To Attach Order as to Defendant Allen Curtis Eisenberger is granted in the amount of $1,575,514. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
